guardian_1.name: Emergency Vault
guardian_1.title: EMERGENCY VAULT
lesson: An emergency fund covers surprise costs.
Try to save enough for 3 months of needs.
Add a little to your fund every time you can.

guardian_2.name: Savings Satellite
guardian_2.title: SAVINGS SATELLITE NET
guardian_2.hint: TAP each 🪙 as it beeps past · skip 💸
lesson: Saving the same day each time builds the habit.
Set up automatic transfers so you never forget.
Even small regular savings add up fast.

guardian_3.name: Security Shield
guardian_3.title: SECURITY SHIELD CMD
guardian_3.hint: AIM and ZAP the 🦹 scammer · spare 👮
lesson: Never share your password or PIN with anyone.
If a deal seems too good to be true, it is a scam.
Ask a trusted adult before clicking strange links.

guardian_4.name: Compound Star
guardian_4.title: COMPOUND CONSTELLATION
guardian_4.hint: TAP fast to grow · grab ✨ · dodge 💸
lesson: Compound interest pays you for money you already saved.
The earlier you save, the more it grows.
Leaving savings alone lets them grow on their own.

guardian_5.name: Dreams Harbor
guardian_5.title: FUTURE DREAMS HARBOR
guardian_5.hint: TILT to keep 🚢 steady in the safe zone
lesson: Saving toward a goal makes it easier to stay on track.
Steady, balanced saving beats spending it all at once.
Big dreams come true one small deposit at a time.

guardian_6.name: Resilience Arena
guardian_6.title: RESILIENCE ARENA
guardian_6.hint: FLIP two cards · find the matching pair
lesson: Everyone slips up with money sometimes.
Start saving again right after a setback.
Each new try makes your money habits stronger.
